name: _Group_Tool_Executor
content: Plan comparator decision recorded: reuse=False, restart_at_step=1. The new plan introduces a significant change in the data preprocessing stage (polymorph selection) which was not present in the old plan. Furthermore, the methodology for entropy estimation has changed from a machine learning approach (Random Forest) to a physical approximation (Dulong-Petit limit). Because the foundational data processing and the core thermodynamic calculation methods have changed, the subsequent steps (reaction mapping, filtering, and visualization) rely on different inputs and logic. Therefore, it is necessary to restart the execution from the beginning to ensure consistency across the new workflow.
